verifier.rationale: All six official source rows, hashes, dates, GTFS identities, and clause partitions were independently checked. The exact expansion yields six routes, six events, thirteen treatments, and twenty-five same-unit project relations; all fifty deterministic ids are new and collision-free, treatment normalization yields nine service_pattern and four bus_stop_or_boarding members, Q20 remains distinct from historical Q20A, and rc7 has one no_wiki_coverage row for each target.

rationale: Six exact official MTA rows establish realized QBNR service-start dates and one new current route identity per row. Each row has multiple bounded treatment members and is reviewed as a Queens Bus Network Redesign route-redesign bundle; predecessor, replacement, alternative, and timetable references remain treatment text or reviewed context only.
